channel.title: 最新限免 / 促销应用
channel.description: GoFans：最新限免 / 促销应用 - Made with love by RSSHub(https://github.com/DIYgod/RSSHub)

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」hPlayer - 万能本地媒体播放器&文件浏览器
item.description:
原价：¥6.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
这是一个界面简洁，功能强大，支持丰富视频、音频文件格式的本地播放器，并可以将电脑下载的视频、动漫、电影等任何格式的媒体文件通过WiFi传到hPlayer中进行播放。 * 支持众多视频格式，无须转码 * 支持滑动快进 * 播放模式锁屏功能 * 文件夹功能 * WiFi批量导入功能 * iTunes导入功能 * 部分格式支持硬件解码 * 通过DLNA投屏手机里的视频到电视上播放 * 支持音频文件的播放 * 支持图片浏览 【文件管理】 - 删除、移动、重命名、创建文件夹 - 支持WiFi传输，无需连接数据线即可传输文件 - 支持ITunes导入功能 【手势功能】 - 水平滑动：调整播放位置 -

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」English Grammar Practice 2018
item.description:
原价：¥12.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
If you want to improve your English grammar greatly, this application is for you. Doing these tests with explanations, you can improve your grammar from Basic to Advanced - free. You will not see only tests. You will also see explanations for each test. It will help you to understand your weak poin

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」PDF Creator Expert
item.description:
原价：¥25.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：macOS
--------------------------------------------------- PDF Creator is a fast, affordable utility to allow you to create professional quality PDF documents. You can create PDF from PDF, XPS, plain text, image formats, including jpg, png, bmp, gif etc. Also you can set up the PDF password, modify the PD

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Anchor Pointer: 步行路线
item.description:
原价：¥45.00 -> 现价：¥25.00
平台：iOS
使用指南针导航。可保存世界任何地方的地点，例如外国的一家酒店，或您的停车点，然后轻松找到返回路线。一分钟内找到您停车的地方。在一分钟之内找到您停车的地方。去徒步时绝对不会迷路。徒步期间您可以保存任何地点，方便安全返回。无法使用地图时也可查找朋友的位置。不必按照地图兜圈子找您的朋友。只需要跟随指向他的箭头即可。

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」沙盒星球
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
模拟真实的太阳系。 模拟宇宙起源，创建您想要的任何星球。 高度自由任意建立你的专属星系。

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iWriter Pro
item.description:
原价：¥78.00 -> 现价：¥68.00

# iWriter Pro is elegant and minimalist text editor with built-in Markdown support. Distraction-free and subscription-free. ## Key Features: - Sync across all your Mac, iPad, and iPhone devices*. - Text editing with live Markdown syntax highlighting. - HTML Preview for Markdown and MultiMarkdown

item.description:

平台：iOS
# iWriter Pro is elegant and minimalist text editor with built-in Markdown support. Distraction-free and subscription-free. ## Features: - Clean and minimal interface. - iCloud sync across iPad, iPhone, and Mac¹ devices. - Text editing with live Markdown syntax highlighting. - HTML Preview for Mar

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」AnyMP4 AVCHD视频转换播放器
item.description:
原价：¥118.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：macOS
AnyMP4 AVCHD 转换器可让您将 AVCHD 视频文件 MTS 和 M2TS 转换为任何流行的视频格式，如 MKV、MP4、MOV、M4V、AVI、MPEG、WMV、FLV 和 WebM。因此，可以将 MTS 和 M2TS 文件导入 Final Cut Pro、iMovie 和 Avid Media Composer，并在 iPad、iPhone、iPod 和 Apple TV 等任何数字设备上观看 AVCHD 视频。它支持将 4K/5K/8K AVCHD 视频转换或将 AVCHD 视频升级为 4K/5K/8K。它还具有多种视频编辑功能。全新的预览窗口使其充当 AVCHD 播放器。您无

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」懒猫记账Pro-无广告、1秒启动
item.description:
原价：¥128.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
懒猫记账Pro是一款实用便捷的记账App。 可以记日常收支、生意流水、旅行开支、家庭收支等多种账目，您可以添加多个账本，来记不同的账。 这是一个可以帮您养成记账习惯的记账APP，记账流程简单流畅。 还有分类流水折线图等，可以很方便的帮你做财务分析。 【数据超安全】 -我们会为您将您的数据自动备份到您的iCloud账户中，无需登录，每天为您自动备份！即使卸载App也能轻松恢复数据！再也不怕数据丢失！ 【账本市场，应有尽有】 10多种场景账本，以及无限多的自定义账本，满足你不同时期的需要： - 旅游账本：旅游预算、旅行清单…满足你天南地北的旅行需求 - 娱乐账本：周六看电影，周末海底捞美味大

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Agonizer

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Podcast Soundboard
item.description:
原价：¥118.00 -> 现价：¥40.00
平台：macOS
Perfect for theater, sportscasting, conference calls, gaming, and podcasting. The easiest way to get started is to drag and drop a file onto the soundboard. Supports the following file formats: .mp3, .wav, .ogg, .webm, .wav, .flac Features: - MIDI device support - Trigger sounds by keyboard or m

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」GuitarLayers
item.description:
原价：¥163.00 -> 现价：¥78.00
平台：macOS
GuitarLayers is a professional macOS guitar education software used by students, schools, teachers and pro guitarists. It allows students and teachers to visualize and manage, scales, chords and arpeggios shapes through a fully parametric control interface. GuitarLayers automatically generates Sca

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」List Ninja
item.description:
原价：¥18.00 -> 现价：¥6.00
平台：iOS
List Ninja is an easy to use list assistant. There is no need for creating an account, you just start right away creating lists. Whether you're planning a trip to the grocery store, a weekend road trip, or learning a new language List Ninja will help you create a list of things you want to get or

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」VoxSyn Pro
item.description:
原价：¥50.00 -> 现价：¥25.00
平台：iOS
VoxSyn Pro turns your voice into the most flexible vocal sound generator ever. Instantly following even subtle modulations of pitch and spectral changes of your voice VoxSyn Pro creates signature vocal sounds far beyond traditional vocoding. Talk or sing into the microphone and you’ll trigger var

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Arpeggist
item.description:
原价：¥50.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Arpeggist is a MIDI Note arpeggiator with a very flexible step matrix editor for programming and a unique “rolling dice” random arpeggio generator. You can build arpeggios from scratch or use one of the factory arpeggios as foundation. You can also create an unlimited number of user arpeggio presets

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Tera Synth
item.description:
原价：¥30.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Tera Synth - Modular Analog Synthesizer Explore new sound spaces with Tera Synth that go beyond the emulation of synthesizer legends. Use the power of analog and digital synthesis combined with new modules for physical modelling. Wireless patching of modules combined with an intelligible modulation

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」microTERA
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥25.00
平台：iOS
Waveshaping Synthesis is a type of distortion synthesis that can create dynamic spectra in a controlled way. In waveshaping, it is possible to change the spectrum with the amplitude of the sound. A simple example of this method is the clipping caused by overdriving an audio amplifier. These simple

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Cube Synth

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」AudioReverb
item.description:
原价：¥45.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Studio quality reverb for AUv3 compatible hosts / Audiobus / Inter-app audio and songs from your iTunes music library. AudioReverb is an algorithmic reverberation app which combines the flexibility of vintage algorithmic reverbs with the sonic quality of convolution based reverbs.   The creation o
